rpg-portfolio.name: Town of Joon
rpg-portfolio.tagline: Retro RPG-style personal website built with Astro.
rpg-portfolio.description: A map-based portfolio experience with custom content collections, story-themed routing, and game-like UI panels.

telemetry-anomaly-radar.name: Telemetry Anomaly Radar
telemetry-anomaly-radar.tagline: Signal detection pipeline for noisy fleet telemetry.
telemetry-anomaly-radar.description: Designed heuristics and alert scoring to surface meaningful anomalies while reducing false positives from high-volume telemetry streams.

voice-note-indexer.name: Voice Note Indexer
voice-note-indexer.tagline: Searchable transcript system for quick idea capture.
voice-note-indexer.description: Converts voice notes into tagged summaries so ideas can be searched, grouped, and revisited as project seeds.

philosophy-digest-bot.name: Philosophy Digest Bot
philosophy-digest-bot.description: Prototype for daily philosophy prompts. Retired after discovering lower user retention than expected.
